text:
* Bumped version to 2.1.6
* Use tarball GNU Makefile instead of do-install et al
* Added files/patch-Makefile
* Added USE_GMAKE
* Added PLIST_FILES variable
* Added MANPAGE to OPTIONS
* Renamed OPTIONS and updated descriptions
* Removed NO_INSTALL_MANPAGES and related
* Removed NO_BUILD
* Removed PORTREVISION to quiet portlint
* Removed SF from MASTER_SITES
* Removed pkg-plist file
